en: Whatever you choose to do with it, you'll be great.
Our family doesn't run from things. You're the best of all of us, Miles.
ko: 우리 가족은 도망치지 않아. 넌 우리 중 최고야, 마일스. 잘 가고 있어. 언제

en: You're on your way. When do I know I'm Spider-Man?
ko: 우리 가족은 도망치지 않아. 넌 우리 중 최고야, 마일스. 잘 가고 있어. 언제

en: You won't. That's all it is, Miles.
♪ Like, what's up, danger? ♪ Made them myself.
♪ Can't stop me now! ♪ ♪ Travel 200 miles, I'm knocking at your door ♪
♪ And I don't really care if you ain't got your eye on me ♪ I said I got you now!
♪ Don't be a stranger, I'm right here at your door ♪
